message.content:
{
  "items": [
    {
      "objective": "Extend the confidentiality obligations beyond two years.",
      "leverage": "Longer confidentiality periods are common in industries where sensitive information is shared.",
      "proposed_language": "These confidentiality obligations shall survive for a period of five (5) years after the termination of this Agreement.",
      "rationale": "Extending the confidentiality period protects both parties' sensitive information for a longer duration, which is crucial in competitive industries.",
      "priority": "high",
      "confidence": 0.8
    },
    {
      "objective": "Limit the indemnification clause to direct damages only.",
      "leverage": "Indemnification for indirect damages can be overly burdensome and is not standard in many agreements.",
      "proposed_language": "Each party shall indemnify and hold harmless the other party from and against any direct claims, damages, and losses arising out of a breach of this Agreement by the indemnifying party.",
      "rationale": "Limiting indemnification to direct damages reduces potential liability and aligns with common practices in similar agreements.",
      "priority": "medium",
      "confidence": 0.7
    },
    {
      "objective": "Increase the limitation of liability cap.",
      "leverage": "A higher cap is more reflective of the potential damages that could arise from a breach.",
      "proposed_language": "The total liability of either party shall not exceed one hundred thousand dollars ($100,000).",
      "rationale": "Increasing the liability cap provides better protection for both parties in the event of significant damages.",
      "priority": "medium",
      "confidence": 0.6
    },
    {
      "objective": "Specify a more flexible termination notice period.",
      "leverage": "A shorter notice period allows for quicker termination if necessary, which can be crucial in fast-paced business environments.",
      "proposed_language": "Either party may terminate this Agreement upon seven (7) days' written notice to the other party.",
      "rationale": "A shorter notice period provides both parties with greater flexibility to exit the agreement if circumstances change.",
      "priority": "low",
      "confidence": 0.5
    },
    {
      "objective": "Clarify the governing law and dispute resolution process.",
      "leverage": "Clear dispute resolution processes can save time and resources in the event of a disagreement.",
      "proposed_language": "This Agreement shall be governed by the laws of the State of California, and any disputes shall be resolved through mediation in San Francisco, California, before resorting to litigation.",
      "rationale": "Adding mediation as a first step can facilitate quicker and less costly resolutions to disputes.",
      "priority": "medium",
      "confidence": 0.7
    }
  ]
}
